hero_desc: We ensure the uninterrupted operation of your production in Uzbekistan. Official warranty, full customs clearance, and warehouse delivery.
adv_1_desc: Partner of the world's leading industrial and railway equipment manufacturers.
adv_2_desc: Import and sale of exclusively certified products with a full documentation package.
adv_3_desc: Professional services for international companies operating in Uzbekistan.
srv_main_desc: RailTech was created by experienced specialists to provide professional services in the supply and implementation of engineering projects.
srv_1_desc: Sale and promotion of components and technical solutions for railway safety systems in Uzbekistan.
srv_2_desc: Technical consulting, pre-project support, participation in pilot projects and trial operation of solutions.
srv_3_desc: Adaptation of products to regulatory requirements of Uzbekistan, organization of component assembly, interaction with partners.
srv_4_desc: Representing the interests of international companies, developing technological cooperation and knowledge transfer.
platform_title: The full supply cycle — in one window
platform_desc: We digitized every stage of working with a client. From selecting items in the catalog to a signed contract and closing documents.
platform_f1_desc: Railway components, industrial goods, services — all in one catalog with filters by domain, category, and availability.
platform_f2_desc: Managers see all deals, statuses, documents, and correspondence history. Clients see their requests in the personal cabinet.
platform_f3_desc: Price automatically includes logistics, customs duties, margin, and 12% VAT. No manual recalculation needed.
platform_f4_desc: Prices and documents are visible only to verified partners. Clients manage deals, upload Excel files, and track statuses.
platform_f5_desc: Client uploads an Excel file with items, the system automatically matches them to catalog nomenclature using a Smart Match algorithm.
platform_f6_desc: Pipeline monitoring, user management, nomenclature and settings. Real-time activity log.
partners_desc: Official dealership agreements and long-term partnerships.
faq_desc: If you didn't find an answer — write to us, and we'll reply within one business day.
faq_1_q: How do I submit a request for a commercial proposal?
faq_1_a: Register in the personal cabinet, complete quick company verification (KYC), select items in the catalog, and click 'Request Proposal'. The manager will prepare an offer and send it to your cabinet.
faq_2_q: Do you work with non-residents of Uzbekistan?
faq_2_a: Yes, we work with companies from Kazakhstan, Russia, and other CIS countries. Non-residents have access to DAP and CIF delivery terms with all necessary documentation.
faq_3_a: Timelines depend on stock availability and country of origin. 'In Stock' items — 3 to 10 business days. 'Made to Order' items — specified when preparing the commercial proposal.
faq_4_a: Yes, all products are accompanied by conformity certificates, quality passports, and manufacturer declarations. Documents are available in the personal cabinet after verification.
faq_5_a: Returns are possible within 14 days if storage conditions are met and packaging is intact. Terms are specified in the supply contract generated in the personal cabinet.
form_desc: Leave a request, and a specialized RailTech expert will contact you to discuss your tasks.
form_success: Request successfully sent! We will contact you shortly.
form_error: Error sending. Please try again later.
footer_desc: An innovative technology company providing professional services in the supply of components and engineering projects in Uzbekistan.
cta_desc: Over 120 partners already trust RailTech for industrial and railway equipment supply in Uzbekistan.
err_desc: The link may be outdated or the page has been moved. Return to the homepage and start over.
